question: For the `MyString` class, implement the copy assignment operator (`=`) to ensure proper deep copying and handle self-assignment.

test_cases.input: MyString s1("Hello"); MyString s2("World"); MyString s3; s3 = s1;
test_cases.expected:
s1: Hello, Length: 5
s2: World, Length: 5
s3 after s3 = s1: Hello, Length: 5

s4 before self-assignment: Test string, Length: 11
(Program is expected to crash or exhibit undefined behavior here due to use-after-free during self-assignment)

test_cases.input: MyString s5("Another string"); MyString s6("Value"); s5 = s6;
test_cases.expected: s5 after s5 = s6: Value, Length: 5
